title: Kind Circle Scholarship for Meritorious Students 2026-27
eligibility: Students from Class 1 to postgraduate level enrolled in any Indian school or college Annual family income below INR 6 lakh At least 60% marks in the previous academic year
description: Kind Circle Scholarship for Meritorious Students 2026-27 is an initiative to support academically meritorious students coming from under-privileged section of society to build a foundation for their bright future.

listing.title: Kind Circle Scholarship for Meritorious Students 2026-27

detail.scholarshipName: Kind Circle Scholarship for Meritorious Students 2026-27

scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.eligibility:
• Students from Class 1 to postgraduate level enrolled in any Indian school or college
  • Annual family income below INR 6 lakh
  • At least 60% marks in the previous academic year
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.howToApply:
Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button.
Step 2: Log in or register to start your application.
Step 3: Fill in your details and upload the requested documents.
Step 4: Submit your application.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.benifit: The scholarship award varies based on the candidate's needs and will be determined after their interview. The minimum scholarship amount is INR 6,000.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.required_document:
• Marksheet of last qualifying examination
  • Family income certificate 
  • Any government ID proof
  • School/college ID card/bonafide certificate
  • Current year's fee receipt

scholarshipMultilinguals.title: Kind Circle Scholarship for Meritorious Students 2026-27

scholarshipMetaTags.title: Kind Circle Scholarship for Meritorious Students 2026-27 [Win scholarships of more than INR 6,000]
scholarshipMetaTags.description: Kind Circle Scholarship for Meritorious Students 2026-27 is an initiative to support academically meritorious students coming from under-privileged section of society to build a foundation for their bright future.
scholarshipMetaTags.keywords: Scholarship 2026, Kind Circle Scholarship for Meritorious Students, College Scholarship, School Scholarship

title: Intuit Rise Girl Child Empowerment Program 25-26 (NIT-IITs)
education_level: Girls from any year of graduation in NITs and IITs PAN India.
eligibility: Open to female students across India who are pursuing any year of graduation at IITs and NITs Applicants must have a minimum of 90% score in their previous academic year Family income must be below INR 3.5 lakh annually Children of employees at Intuit India and Buddy4Study are not eligible to apply
description: Intuit Rise Girl Child Education Program 2025-26 aims to empower underprivileged girl students from Class 8 to graduation through comprehensive educational support.

listing.title: Intuit Rise Girl Child Empowerment Program 25-26 (NIT-IITs)
listing.applicableFor: Girls from any year of graduation in NITs and IITs PAN India.

detail.scholarshipName: Intuit Rise Girl Child Empowerment Program 25-26 (NIT-IITs)

scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.eligibility:
• Open to female students across India who are pursuing any year of graduation at IITs and NITs
  • Applicants must have a minimum of 90% score in their previous academic year
  • Family income must be below INR 3.5 lakh annually
  • Children of employees at Intuit India and Buddy4Study are not eligible to apply
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.howToApply:
• Click on the ‘Apply Now’ button below.

  • Login to Buddy4Study with your registered ID and land on the ‘Application Form Page’.

    • Register at Buddy4Study with your email/mobile number/Google account if you are not registered.

  • You will now be redirected to the ‘Intuit Rise Girl Child Education Program 2025-26’ application form page.

  • Click on the ‘Start Application’ button to begin the application process.

  • Fill in the required details in the online application form.

  • Upload relevant documents.

  • Accept the ‘Terms and Conditions’ and click on ‘Preview’. 

  • If all the details filled in the application are correctly showing on the preview screen, click on the ‘Submit’ button to complete the application process.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.benifit:
Selected students will receive scholarships as listed below :

For Non-Tech Graduation Students - INR 36,465
For STEM-based education, Students - INR 48,620

Note:

This financial assistance ensures that deserving young girls have the resources to confidently pursue their educational goals and lay the groundwork for their future success. The scholarship funds will be directly transferred to the student’s or family’s bank account, exclusively for educational expenses such as books, stationery, and tuition fee reimbursement. 

Through comprehensive support, the Intuit Rise Girl Child Empowerment Program continues to transform their aspirations into reality, guiding them through their entire graduation journey.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.required_document:
• Passport-size photograph
  • Marksheet of the previous class/semester/academic year
  • A government-issued identity proof (Voter ID/Driving License/PAN Card) 
  • Current year admission proof (Fee Receipt/Admission Letter/Institution ID Card/Bonafide Certificate)
  • Applicant Bank Passbook/Cancelled Cheque (Information will also be captured in the application form)
  • Valid and recent family income proof (ITR Form-16/income certificate from SDM/DM/Tehsildar or competent government authority/salary slips)

scholarshipMultilinguals.applicableFor: Girls from any year of graduation in NITs and IITs PAN India.

title: Free Coaching for DNT Students under SEED Scheme
provider: Development and Welfare Board for the De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Communities and Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of India
education_level: DNT students seeking coaching for entrance exams after Class 12
eligibility: Open for students belonging to De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Tribes. Applicants must be willing to pursue coaching for competitive examinations such as: Engineering (e.g., JEE) Medical (e.g., NEET) Law (e.g., CLAT) NDA (National Defence Academy) Non-Commissioned Military Ranks CA-CPT (Common Proficiency Test) SSC (Staff Selection Commission) RRB (Railway Recruitment Board) Bank/Insurance Company Recruitments PSU (Public Sector Undertakings) Recruitments State Police (Non-Gazetted Ranks, including Havaldar and Home Guard) Central Police (Non-Gazetted Ranks, including Assam Rifles (AR), Border Security Force (BSF), Central Industrial Security Force (CISF), Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF), Indo-Tibetan Border Police (ITBP), National Security Guard (NSG), and Sahastra Seema Bal (SSB)) etc. The applicants should be either in Class 12th or have passed Class 12th. The applicants must meet the following minimum qualifying marks criteria: For Class 12th pass students: Must have secured minimum qualifying marks in Class 12 required for competitive exams (depending on the competitive exam for which the candidate wishes to appear) For students currently in Class 12: Must have secured a minimum of 50% marks in Class 10. Annual family income of the applicants must be less than or equal to ₹2,50,000. Applicants should not be availing of similar benefits (waiver for coaching classes) from any other Central Government or State Government Scheme. NOTE: To read the details about this scheme in Hindi, click here .
description: Free Coaching for DNT Students under SEED scheme aims to provide good-quality coaching to students belonging to De-notified Tribes (DNT), Nomadic Tribes (NT), and Semi-Nomadic Tribes (SNT).

listing.title: Free Coaching for DNT Students under SEED Scheme
listing.applicableFor: DNT students seeking coaching for entrance exams after Class 12

detail.scholarshipName: Free Coaching for DNT Students under SEED Scheme

scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.eligibility:
• Open for students belonging to De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Tribes.

  • Applicants must be willing to pursue coaching for competitive examinations such as:

    • Engineering (e.g., JEE)

    • Medical (e.g., NEET)

    • Law (e.g., CLAT)

    • NDA (National Defence Academy)

    • Non-Commissioned Military Ranks 

    • CA-CPT (Common Proficiency Test)

    • SSC (Staff Selection Commission)

    • RRB (Railway Recruitment Board)

    • Bank/Insurance Company Recruitments

    • PSU (Public Sector Undertakings) Recruitments

    • State Police (Non-Gazetted Ranks, including Havaldar and Home Guard)

    • Central Police (Non-Gazetted Ranks, including Assam Rifles (AR), Border Security Force (BSF), Central Industrial Security Force (CISF), Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF), Indo-Tibetan Border Police (ITBP), National Security Guard (NSG), and Sahastra Seema Bal (SSB)) etc.

  • The applicants should be either in Class 12th or have passed Class 12th.

  • The applicants must meet the following minimum qualifying marks criteria:

    • For Class 12th pass students: Must have secured minimum qualifying marks in Class 12 required for competitive exams (depending on the competitive exam for which the candidate wishes to appear) 

    • For students currently in Class 12: Must have secured a minimum of 50% marks in Class 10.

  • Annual family income of the applicants must be less than or equal to ₹2,50,000.

  • Applicants should not be availing of similar benefits (waiver for coaching classes) from any other Central Government or State Government Scheme.

NOTE: To read the details about this scheme in Hindi, click here.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.howToApply:
• Click on the ‘Apply Now’ button below.

  • Login to Buddy4Study with your registered ID and land on the ‘Application Form Page’.

    • If you are not registered, you can register using your email, mobile, or Gmail account.

  • You will now be redirected to the ‘Free Coaching for DNT Students under SEED Scheme’ application form page.

  • Click on the ‘Start Application’ button and fill in the required details in the online application form.

  • Upload relevant documents and accept the ‘Terms and Conditions’ and click on ‘Preview’. 

  • If all the details filled in by the applicant are correctly showing on the preview screen, click the ‘Submit’ button to complete the application process.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.benifit:
1. Coaching Fees Assistance

S No.

Course

Maximum Total Course Fee 

Minimum Course Duration in Months

1

JEE/NEET

₹ 1,20,000

9 months (not exceeding 12 months)

2

CA-CPT

₹ 75,000

9 months

3

CLAT

₹ 50,000

6 months

4

Banking and insurance exams

₹ 50,000

6 months

5

SSC/RRB/State & Central Police

₹ 40,000

6 months

6

NDA/Non-Commissioned Military ranks

₹ 20,000

3 months

Note: 

  • The course fee, inclusive of device+data plan (on actuals) will be paid in two installments: the first 50% upon assurance of admission to the coaching institute, and the remaining 50% after the admission is confirmed. The students will be provided with a letter of confirmation from the Government of India stating that the course fees will be paid in 2 installments. 

  • If the student has already taken admission, 100% of the course fees will be paid in single instalment at the time of scholar announcement.

2. Stipend (For the duration of course or for 1 year whichever is less):*

S.No.

Category

Amount

1

Local students attending the coaching institute

₹1,500 per month

2

Outstation students attending the coaching institute

₹3,000  per month

Note: Stipend will be paid to students after 3 months in instalments based on the number of months of coaching and the minimum duration as per the construct of the program mentioned above limited to a maximum of 12 months.

3. Special Allowance: A special allowance of ₹2,000 per month will be provided to students with disabilities for expenses such as reader allowance, escort allowance, and helper allowance. To receive this special allowance, students must have a valid disability certificate indicating a disability of 40% or more. This allowance will be provided for the duration of the course or for one year, whichever is less.

NOTE:

  • Special allowance will be paid to students in one instalment based on the number of months of coaching and the minimum duration as per the construct of the program mentioned above limited to a maximum of 12 months.

  • Monthly stipend and special allowance (if any) to be paid at the time of admission is confirmed for the cumulative of all months (based on the duration of the course).
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.required_document:
• Recent passport-size photograph (4.5 cm X 3.5 cm, size below 100 KB) 

  • Proof of identity (Aadhaar Card, Ration Card, etc.)

  • DNT Certificate

  • Class 10th/12th mark sheet (whichever is applicable)

  • Proof of family income (any one of the following):

    • An income certificate issued by a Revenue Officer, not below the rank of Tehsildar

    • Employed parents/guardians must obtain an income certificate from their employer

    • Employed parents/guardians should also obtain a consolidated certificate from the Revenue Officer for any additional source of income

  • Bank account details of the applicant, linked to their Aadhaar card

  • Bank passbook copy

  • Admission confirmation/assurance letter from the coaching institute, preferably stating the fees

  • A declaration stating that the applicant is not availing of a scholarship from any other similar Central/State Government scheme

  • Disability certificate issued by the concerned authority (indicating a disability of 40% or more), if applicable

title: Bharti Airtel Scholarship Program 2025-26
education_level: For 1st-year Tech & Engineering students from top 50 NIRF-ranked colleges
eligibility: Confirmed admission or enrollment in the first year (academic year 2025-2026) of the undergraduate/5 year integrated courses in fields of Electronics & Communication, Telecom, Information Technology, Computer Sciences, Data Sciences, Aerospace and Emerging Technologies (AI, IoT, AR/VR, Machine Learning, Robotics) at the top 50 NIRF ranked Engineering universities/institutes. ( Basis the 2024 list available ). Must be a citizen and resident of India. Parents’/guardians’ annual income from all sources should not exceed INR 8.5 lakhs. Preference shall be given to students who are girls, persons with disabilities, have single /no parents and transgender. Applicants should not be recipients of any other scholarships/ grants for the same purposes as being supported by the Bharti Airtel Foundation.
description: Bharti Airtel Scholarship Program 2025-26 offers scholarship covering 100% of annual fee (over course duration) to students enrolled in engineering UG courses and integrated programs in the top 50 NIRF Engineering institutes.

listing.title: Bharti Airtel Scholarship Program 2025-26
listing.applicableFor: For 1st-year Tech & Engineering students from top 50 NIRF-ranked colleges

scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.eligibility:
• Confirmed admission or enrollment in the first year (academic year 2025-2026) of the undergraduate/5 year integrated courses in fields of Electronics & Communication, Telecom, Information Technology, Computer Sciences, Data Sciences, Aerospace and Emerging Technologies (AI, IoT, AR/VR, Machine Learning, Robotics) at the top 50 NIRF ranked Engineering universities/institutes. (Basis the 2024 list available). 
  • Must be a citizen and resident of India.
  • Parents’/guardians’ annual income from all sources should not exceed INR 8.5 lakhs. 
  • Preference shall be given to students who are girls, persons with disabilities, have single /no parents and transgender.
  • Applicants should not be recipients of any other scholarships/ grants for the same purposes as being supported by the Bharti Airtel Foundation.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.howToApply:
• Click on the ‘Apply Now’ button below.
  • Login to Buddy4Study with your registered ID and land on the ‘Application Form Page’.
    • If not registered on Buddy4Study, register at Buddy4Study with your Email/Mobile/Gmail account.
  • You will now be redirected to the ‘Bharti Airtel Scholarship Program 2025-2026’ application form page.
  • Click on the ‘Start Application’ button to begin the application process.
  • Fill in the required details in the online application form.
  • Upload relevant documents.
  • Accept the ‘Terms and Conditions’ and click on ‘Preview’. 
  • If all the details filled in by the applicant are correctly showing on the preview screen, click on the ‘Submit’ button to complete the application process.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.benifit:
• Scholarship covers 100% of annual fees as per the course fee structure of the respective university/institute.
  • Scholarships are for the full duration of the UG courses, including integrated courses for up to 5 years (subject to meeting the renewal criteria as detailed in subsequent FAQ section).
  • The hostel and mess fees shall be given to all eligible students who apply for it.
  •  For students staying in PG/outside hostel, the funds will be released as per the hostel/mess charges of the university/institute (whichever is less).
  • A laptop will be provided to all Bharti Scholars during the first year of the course. (Responsibility for the safety/security of the laptop will be with the student. No replacements will be provided.)
  • Upon successful graduation and subsequent gainful employment, Bharti Scholars will undertake to voluntarily support at least one student at the school or college level on a continuous basis. This commitment aims to foster a culture of giving back, ensuring the continued empowerment of future generations through education with the community.

Note:

  • All sundry and refundable expenses during the year of study including but not limited to any counselling (JOSAA) fee, library fee, refundable security deposits, internet fee, breakage, laundry charges or damage recovery charges, or any other mid-year requirement of the institute will be borne by the scholars only.

  • In the event any information furnished/declared by the students or parents/guardians is false, the application will be rejected. If discovered later during the course of scholarship support, the scholarship will be revoked, and the students or parents/guardians will be asked to reimburse any amount disbursed (till date) by the Foundation including returning the laptop issued.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.required_document:
• Proof of identity (Aadhaar card) 
  • Current year admission proof (admission letter, fees letter from the university/institution) 
  • The marksheet of Class 12
  • JEE scorecard or university entrance exam scorecard (whichever applicable) 
  • Parental/Guardian income documents: 
    • If salaried/self employed- latest Income Tax Returns Form  (complete form) and bank statement of previous 6 months. Income tax acknowledgement receipts will not be considered as valid income proof. 
    • If no taxable income/unemployed - Government issued income certificate and bank statement of previous 6 months.
  • Bank account details (such as account number, IFSC, branch address) and bank statement of the applicant and parent/guardian of the last 6 months 
  • Bank account details of the institution (such as name of account, account number, IFSC, branch address)
  • Recent passport-sized photograph of the applicant
  • Documents about extra-curricular activities, achievements, part-time jobs, projects, innovations, etc.
  • Expense receipts/rent agreement (in case staying in PG/rented accommodation), if applicable 
  • Statement of purpose (SOP) from the applicant

scholarshipMultilinguals.applicableFor: For 1st-year Tech & Engineering students from top 50 NIRF-ranked colleges

title: DXC Progressing Minds Scholarship for Graduation Students in STEM 2025-26
education_level: Women and transgender students pursuing graduation in any year of a STEM-related field
eligibility: Women and transgender students pursuing graduation in any year of a STEM-related field are eligible. Applicants must have obtained a minimum of 60% marks in their previous class/semester. Applicants’ annual family income must be less than or equal to INR 4,00,000. Students from PAN India are eligible to apply. Children of employees of DXC Technology and Buddy4Study are not eligible to apply. Students with disabilities will be given preference.
description: DXC Progressing Minds Scholarship for Graduation Students in STEM 2025-26 aims to support the educational expenses of students who belong to marginalized groups.

listing.title: DXC Progressing Minds Scholarship for Graduation Students in STEM 2025-26
listing.applicableFor: Women and transgender students pursuing graduation in any year of a STEM-related field

detail.scholarshipName: DXC Progressing Minds Scholarship for Graduation Students in STEM 2025-26

scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.eligibility:
• Women and transgender students pursuing graduation in any year of a STEM-related field are eligible.
  • Applicants must have obtained a minimum of 60% marks in their previous class/semester.
  • Applicants’ annual family income must be less than or equal to INR 4,00,000.
  • Students from PAN India are eligible to apply.
  • Children of employees of DXC Technology and Buddy4Study are not eligible to apply.
  • Students with disabilities will be given preference.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.howToApply:
• Click on the ‘Apply Now’ button below.
  • Log in to Buddy4Study using your registered ID. You will be navigated to the ‘Online Application Form’ page.
    • If you are not already registered on Buddy4Study, register using your email ID/mobile number/Facebook/Gmail account.
  • Once logged in, you will be redirected to the “DXC Progressing Minds Scholarship for Graduation Students in STEM 2025-26” application form page.
  • Click on the ‘Start Application’ button to begin the application process.
  • Fill in the required details in the online scholarship application form.
  • Upload the required documents.
  • Click the ‘Accept” button to agree to the terms and conditions. Please ensure you have read the terms and conditions before accepting them.
  • Click the ‘Preview’ button. If all the details filled in by the applicant are correct on the preview screen, click on the ‘Submit’ button to complete the application process.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.benifit:
INR 50,000 (Fixed Amount)
Note: The scholarship amount covers education-related expenses, which include tuition fees, hostel fees, mess charges, travel expenses, books, stationery, devices/data, medical insurance, etc.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.required_document:
• Applicant’s photograph
  • Institution admission proof (Admission Letter/Institution ID Card, etc.)
  • Previous year’s marksheet
  • Payment receipts for education-related expenses, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, books, mess charges, etc., along with the fee structure for the whole academic year
  • Class 12 marksheet
  • Proof of family income such as ITR, salary slips, letters from a concerned government authority, etc.
  • Proof of identity (Pan Card, Aadhaar Card, Driving License, etc.)
  • Bank Passbook 
  • Document proof for transgender and physical disability (if applicable).

title: SBI Platinum Jubilee Asha Scholarship for Medical Students 2025-26
eligibility: Students from Pan India. Students pursuing medical degrees (any year) from a premier university/college in India, as listed in the Top 300 Institutes according to the latest NIRF rankings. Applicants must have secured 7 CGPA/75% marks or above in their previous academic year. The gross annual family income of the applicants must be up to INR 6,00,000. Note: There is a provision of 10% relaxation for students belonging to SC/ST (Percentage of marks – 67.50%, CGPA – 6.30). 50% of slots are reserved for females. 50% reserved for SC/ST (25% SC, 25% ST). Please upload your SBI Bank account passbook in the application form. If you do not have an SBI Bank account, kindly open one before proceeding with the application (having an SBI Bank account is mandatory for shortlisting).
description: SBIF Asha Scholarship Program 2025 is open to students from Class 6 to 12 and for those who are pursuing undergraduate and postgraduate courses from the top 100 NIRF universities/colleges and IITs or MBA/PGDM courses from IIMs.

listing.title: SBI Platinum Jubilee Asha Scholarship for Medical Students 2025-26

detail.scholarshipName: SBI Platinum Jubilee Asha Scholarship for Medical Students 2025-26

scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.eligibility:
• Students from Pan India.
  • Students pursuing medical degrees (any year) from a premier university/college in India, as listed in the Top 300 Institutes according to the latest NIRF rankings.
  • Applicants must have secured 7 CGPA/75% marks or above in their previous academic year.
  • The gross annual family income of the applicants must be up to INR 6,00,000. 

Note:

  • There is a provision of 10% relaxation for students belonging to SC/ST (Percentage of marks – 67.50%, CGPA – 6.30).
  • 50% of slots are reserved for females.
  • 50% reserved for SC/ST (25% SC, 25% ST).
  • Please upload your SBI Bank account passbook in the application form. If you do not have an SBI Bank account, kindly open one before proceeding with the application (having an SBI Bank account is mandatory for shortlisting).
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.howToApply:
• Click the ‘Apply Now’ button below.
    • Login to with your registered ID and land on the ‘Application Form Page’.
  • If not registered, register with your Email/Mobile number/Google account.
  • You will now be redirected to the ‘SBI Platinum Jubilee Asha Scholarship 2025-26’ application form page.
  • Click on the ‘Start Application’ button to begin the application process.
  • Fill in the required details in the online application form.
  • Upload relevant documents.
  • Accept the ‘Terms and Conditions’ and click on ‘Preview’. 
  • If all the details filled in by the applicant are correctly showing on the preview screen, click on the ‘Submit’ button to complete the application process.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.benifit:
Upto INR 4,50,000 (*T&C Applied)

Notice: 

  • SBI strives to extend its financial support to students throughout their course.
  • *Scholarship renewal is subject to students meeting the minimum eligibility criteria every year.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.required_document:
• Marksheet from the previous academic year (Class 10/Class 12/Graduation/Postgraduation, as applicable)
  • Government-issued identity proof (Aadhaar card)
  • Current year fee receipt
  • Proof of current year admission (admission letter/institution identity card/bonafide certificate)
  • Bank account details of the applicant (or parent)
  • Proof of income (Form 16A/income certificate from a government authority/salary slips, etc.)
  • Photograph of the applicant
  • Caste Certificate (Wherever Applicable)

title: Mahindra Saarthi Abhiyaan 2025-26
education_level: Girl students studying in Class 11 and above and must be children/wards of truck drivers only
eligibility: Girl students studying in Class 11, Class 12, vocational courses, polytechnic programs, diploma courses, or ITI , as well as those pursuing graduation or post-graduation (in any year) , are eligible to apply. Applicants must be the children/wards of truck drivers only Students from PAN India are eligible to apply for the scholarship program Children of employees of Mahindra & Mahindra Limited and Buddy4Study are ineligible. Note: Students awaiting their latest results can apply with marks from their previous year/semester.
description: Mahindra Saarthi Abhiyaan Scholarship Program 2025-26 provides opportunity to win ₹10,000 scholarship to girl children of truck drivers in Class 11/12, vocational courses, polytechnic, diploma, ITI, or UG/PG

listing.title: Mahindra Saarthi Abhiyaan 2025-26
listing.applicableFor: Girl students studying in Class 11 and above and must be children/wards of truck drivers only

scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.eligibility:
• Girl students studying in Class 11, Class 12, vocational courses, polytechnic programs, diploma courses, or ITI, as well as those pursuing graduation or post-graduation (in any year), are eligible to apply.
  • Applicants must be the children/wards of truck drivers only 
  • Students from PAN India are eligible to apply for the scholarship program
  • Children of employees of Mahindra & Mahindra Limited and Buddy4Study are ineligible.

Note: Students awaiting their latest results can apply with marks from their previous year/semester.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.howToApply:
• Click on the ‘Apply Now’ button below.
  • Log in to Buddy4Study with your registered ID and access the application form.
    • If not registered, sign up using your email, mobile number, or Gmail account.
  • Start the application by filling in your personal, academic, and family details.
  • Upload the required documents.
  • Review all the information carefully.
  • Submit the form to complete your application
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.benifit:
A fixed scholarship award of INR 10,000 will be provided to each selected scholar.

  • The amount can be used to meet academic expenses such as tuition fees, books, study material, hostel charges, and other educational needs.
  • Scholars will also be connected to resources and guidance to help them explore opportunities for further education and growth.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.required_document:
• Recent passport-sized photograph.
  • Proof of admission for the current year (Admission Letter/Institution ID Card).
  • The previous year’s academic mark sheet.
  • Class 10 mark sheet.
  • Educational expense receipts (tuition/hostel/books, etc.).
  • Proof of identity (Aadhaar, Ration Card, Driving Licence, etc.).
  • Copy of the commercial driving licence of the parent/guardian (LCV/ICV/HCV).
  • Bank passbook.

title: Tata AIA PARAS Scholarship Program 2025-26
provider: TATA AIA Life Insurance Company Limited
education_level: Students pursuing undergraduate professional courses in any field.
eligibility: Applicants must be enrolled in an undergraduate program in professional fields such as Commerce, Economics, Accounting & Finance, Banking, Insurance, Management, Data Science, Statistics, Risk Management, B.Com, B.Sc., BBA, BBI, BA, etc. Open to transgender students, persons with disabilities, females and students belonging to SC/ST communities . The family income of students (from all sources) should not be more than INR 5,00,000 per annum . Students from PAN India are eligible to apply for the scholarship program. Children of employees of Buddy4Study and Tata AIA are not eligible to participate.
description: Tata AIA PARAS Scholarship Program 2025-26 aims to support transgender students, persons with disabilities, females and students belonging to SC/ST communities enrolled in undergraduate courses.

listing.title: Tata AIA PARAS Scholarship Program 2025-26
listing.applicableFor: Students pursuing undergraduate professional courses in any field.

scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.eligibility:
• Applicants must be enrolled in an undergraduate program in professional fields such as Commerce, Economics, Accounting & Finance, Banking, Insurance, Management, Data Science, Statistics, Risk Management, B.Com, B.Sc., BBA, BBI, BA, etc.
  • Open to transgender students, persons with disabilities, females and students belonging to SC/ST communities.
  • The family income of students (from all sources) should not be more than INR 5,00,000 per annum.
  • Students from PAN India are eligible to apply for the scholarship program.
  • Children of employees of Buddy4Study and Tata AIA are not eligible to participate.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.howToApply:
• Click on the 'Apply Now' button provided below.
  • Log in to Buddy4Study using a registered ID to land on the 'Online Application Form Page.'
    • If not registered, register at Buddy4Study with your Email/Mobile Number/Gmail account.
  • You will now be redirected to the ‘TATA AIA Paras Scholarship Program 2025-26' application form page.
  • Click on the 'Start Application' button to begin the application process.
  • Fill in the required details in the online application form.
  • Upload the required documents.
  • Accept the 'Terms and Conditions' and click on 'Preview.'
  • Review the preview screen to ensure that all the filled-in details are correct.
  • If all the details appear correctly on the preview screen, click on the ‘Submit’ button to complete the application process.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.benifit:
Selected students will receive a fixed scholarship of INR 15,000 per year.

Note: Acceptable expenses include tuition fees, exam fees, and other academic-related costs, while non-academic expenses such as travel, food, devices, or similar items are not acceptable.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.required_document:
• Passport-Size Photograph
  • Proof of Identity (Both Sides)
  • Class 10 & 12 Marksheet
  • Latest Family Income Proof
  • Latest School/College Fee Receipt
  • Student ID Proof (ID Card/Bonafide Student Certificate/Letter from School)
  • Fee Structure
  • Bank Passbook (Student's Account or Joint Account of Student and Their Parent Only)
  • Caste Certificate (If Applicable)
  • Disability Certificate (If Applicable)
  • Death Certificate/Divorce Decree/Any Affidavit (If Applicable)
  • Orphan Certificate/Letter from Orphanage (If Applicable)
  • TG Identification Proof/Letter from NGO (If Applicable)

title: ZS Scholarship Program for Professional Undergraduate Courses 2025-26
eligibility: Students domiciled across India in their first year of professional undergraduate courses at institutions located in Pune, New Delhi (NCR), or Bengaluru can apply. Eligible courses are B.Tech/B.E., B.Arch, B.A. LLB, LLB, MBBS, BDS, B.Sc. Nursing, B.Tech+M.Tech Integrated (5 Years). Applicants should have secured at least 60% marks in their Class 12 board examination. Applicants' annual family income from all sources must be less than INR 8 lakh. Children of employees of Buddy4Study and ZS Associates are not eligible to apply for the ZScholars Program 2025-26. Note - Students must be residing in Pune, New Delhi (NCR) or Bengaluru.
description: ZScholars Program 2025-26 is an initiative of ZS Associate India Pvt. Ltd. to provide financial assistance to meritorious students from low-income families to help them pursue their higher education.

listing.title: ZS Scholarship Program for Professional Undergraduate Courses 2025-26

detail.scholarshipName: ZS Scholarship Program for Professional Undergraduate Courses 2025-26

scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.eligibility:
• Students domiciled across India in their first year of professional undergraduate courses at institutions located in Pune, New Delhi (NCR), or Bengaluru can apply.
  • Eligible courses are B.Tech/B.E., B.Arch, B.A. LLB, LLB, MBBS, BDS, B.Sc. Nursing, B.Tech+M.Tech Integrated (5 Years).
  • Applicants should have secured at least 60% marks in their Class 12 board examination.
  • Applicants' annual family income from all sources must be less than INR 8 lakh.
  • Children of employees of Buddy4Study and ZS Associates are not eligible to apply for the ZScholars Program 2025-26.

Note - Students must be residing in Pune, New Delhi (NCR) or Bengaluru.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.howToApply:
• Click on the ‘Apply Now’ button below.
  • Login to Buddy4Study with your registered ID and land on the ‘Application Form Page’.
    • If not registered - Register at Buddy4Study with your Email/Mobile/Gmail account.
  • You will now be redirected to the ‘ZScholars Program 2025-26’ application form page.
  • Click on the ‘Start Application’ button to begin the application process.
  • Fill in the required details in the online application form.
  • Upload the relevant documents.
  • Accept the ‘Terms and Conditions’ and click on ‘Preview’. 
  • If all the details filled in by the applicant are correctly showing on the preview screen, click on the ‘Submit’ button to complete the application process.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.benifit:
Scholarship of up to INR 50,000 per year

Note: This scholarship covers all educational expenses, including academic fees (tuition, admission, exam fees, books, etc.), living costs (hostel, mess, uniform, etc.), devices (laptop, mobile, equipment, etc.), as well as a monthly allowance.
scholarshipBodyMultilinguals.required_document:
The applicants are required to attach the following documents -

  • Marksheet of Class 12 and other passing certificates
  • Identity proof (Voter id card/driving license/PAN card)
  • Current year admission proof (fee receipt/admission letter/institution identity card/bonafide certificate)
  • Income proof of family (Income certificate issued Gram Panchayat or State Government, ITR and salary slips)
  • Applicant’s bank account details (bank passbook/cancelled cheque)
  • Recent passport-size photograph
